title: Tabs
description: Accessible tabs with three variants (line, pill, segmented), icons, badges and support for panels via `panel-{value}` slots.

variants.title: Variants
variants.desc: Three visual styles: bottom line, filled pill and segmented control.

icons.title: With icons
icons.desc: Each item can declare an optional icon that renders to the left of the label.

panels.title: With panels
panels.desc: Define a `panel-{value}` slot per tab to show content synced with the selection.

controlled.title: Controlled
controlled.desc: Active state lives in your component; read and write through v-model.

badges.title: With badges
badges.desc: Each item supports a numeric or text `badge` shown to the right of the label.

props.items: Tab list. Each item accepts value, label, icon, badge, disabled, to.
props.modelValue: Value of the active tab. Use v-model.
props.color: Semantic color applied to the active tab.
props.size: Size and padding of each tab.
props.radius: Radius of pills/segmented. Inherits from ModoProvider.
props.fullWidth: Stretches the tablist to 100% and distributes items evenly.
props.lazy: Only mount panels the first time they're activated.
props.keepMounted: Keeps panels mounted (hidden) when switching tabs.
props.linkComponent: Component for items with `to`. Use RouterLink for vue-router.

emits.updateModelValue: Emitted when the tab changes. Used by v-model.
emits.change: Emitted after a tab change with the complete item.

slots.panelByValue: Panel content for each item, identified by its value.
slots.panel: Fallback slot applied to panels that don't define their own slot.

a11y.kbTab: Move focus into or out of the tab list
a11y.kbShiftTab: Move focus to the previous focusable element
a11y.ariaLabel: Provides an accessible name for the tab list
a11y.focusNative: Focus is managed by the tablist; arrow keys navigate between tabs
